why_this_action.summary: Refresh the stale primary-repo-flat contact packet after the delivery-window truth fix so active review-window targets stay excluded and AI Saying remains actionable.
supporting_reasons: AI Saying is the remaining packet-executable primary-repo-flat target after excluding active manual-review-window coverage.
Old delivery logs tied to the latest packet path must not make a freshly changed target set look already delivered.
A truthful Codeberg-first packet for AI Saying is more useful than another empty-board guard note.

result.summary: Detected that the primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet already matches the discovered target set, so this run enforced follow-through instead of regenerating the same packet.
